'''hazaba''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:chaffinch|chaffinch]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-z-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:chaffinch|chaffinch]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| hazaba
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæzæbæth|hæzæbæth]] || [[word:hæzæbæj|hæzæbæj]] || [[word:hæzæbæsh|hæzæbæsh]] || [[word:hæzæbæ|hæzæbæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hazazabath|hazazabath]] || [[word:hazazabaj|hazazabaj]] || [[word:hazazabash|hazazabash]] || [[word:hazazaba|hazazaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hazabath|hazabath]] || [[word:hazabaj|hazabaj]] || [[word:hazabash|hazabash]] || [[word:hazaba|hazaba]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hazafbath|hazafbath]] || [[word:hazafbaj|hazafbaj]] || [[word:hazafbash|hazafbash]] || [[word:hazafbaf|hazafbaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hazabatha|hazabatha]] || [[word:hazabaja|hazabaja]] || [[word:hazabasha|hazabasha]] || [[word:hazabaka|hazabaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hazabath|hazabath]] || [[word:hazabaj|hazabaj]] || [[word:hazabash|hazabash]] || [[word:hazaba|hazaba]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hazabathal|hazabathal]] || [[word:hazabajal|hazabajal]] || [[word:hazabashal|hazabashal]] || [[word:hazabakal|hazabakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hazabathatha|hazabathatha]] || [[word:hazabajaja|hazabajaja]] || [[word:hazabashasha|hazabashasha]] || [[word:hazabaka|hazabaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hazabathan|hazabathan]] || [[word:hazabajan|hazabajan]] || [[word:hazabashan|hazabashan]] || [[word:hazabakan|hazabakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hazabathaoro|hazabathaoro]] || [[word:hazabajaoro|hazabajaoro]] || [[word:hazabashaoro|hazabashaoro]] || [[word:hazabakaoro|hazabakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|4f6272c}}
